name: BASSETT FURNITURE INDUSTRIES INC
summary: Bassett Furniture Industries, Incorporated is a furniture manufacturer and retailer. The company designs, manufactures, and sells a broad range of home furnishings including bedroom, dining room, and living room furniture. Bassett operates retail stores and sells through wholesale channels. The company references fiscal years ending in late November, with fiscal 2024 containing 53 weeks and fiscal 2025 and 2023 each containing 52 weeks.

products.name: Bedroom Furniture
products.description: Residential bedroom furniture sold through retail and wholesale channels.

products.name: Dining Room Furniture
products.description: Residential dining room furniture sold through retail and wholesale channels.

products.name: Living Room Furniture
products.description: Residential living room furniture sold through retail and wholesale channels.
